titleStmt.title: SII 39.152: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 152. (A.R. No. 152 of 1916.) KĪLPULAM, ARKONAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. KAILĀSANĀTHA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH AND SOUTH WALL VAYIRAMĒGAVARMAN-2ND YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of land by the ūrār of Palakalam to five persons meant for beating Śegaṇḍi and for blowing trumpets on the occasion of sribali in the temple of Tirukkūḷichcharattu Āḻvār at Palakalam in Dāmar kōṭṭam, by Muḷḷikkuḍaiyāṉ Aditanāḷi. Also mentions the signatory as Ilaṅgōvaṉ, son of Peruntachchaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī
śrī vayirameka panmaṟku yāṇṭu
2 Āvatu tāmaṟ koṭṭattup palakalattut tirukkūḷiccara
ttu Āḷvārkku Ivvūril muḷḷik kuṭaiyāṉ Ātittaṉāḷi Itte
varkku tiruppali mūṉṟu
tecakālamum cekaṇṭi
kai Uṭpaṭa Ai
ñcāḷ koṇṭu ti
ruppali koṭṭuvatar
ku vaitta nilam
lli Uḻuvāṉeṉṟa ceṟuvum
Ūruvati yeṉṟa ceṟuvum Iv
vūril Uvaiccar kuriyatu Eppe
r paṭṭatum koṇṭu Ivvūril Ara
ṇic ciṅka Uvaccaṉ koṭṭuvatāka vaitto
m palakalattūrom Ivanukku Epperppaṭṭa sama
paricāram vaitto
m Innilattukku Ērum
mañciyu Ivaṉey cey
tu koṇṭu Orāḷi nīr muṟai
toru maṭaittuk koḷvatāka vai
ttom Ittirukkoyiluṭaiya kū
ḷi civaṉum Ivaṉ tampi maticūta
civaṉum mūṉṟu tecakālamum tiruvamu
tu kāṭṭi Iraṇṭārka kāḷamu
tuvārkaḷākavum vaittom palakalattūrom Itdhanmam rakṣippar tiruppātameṉtalai melaṉam
Ithanmam Aḻittār keṅkāk kanyān=tarattuc ceytār ceyta pāvattup paṭuvār Ivai
kaṟṟaḷip peruntaccaṉ makaṉ Iḷaṅkāva ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
